title: lilium georgei
intro: Lilium georgei, also known as the George's lily, is a species of lily native to the mountainous regions of China. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat a variety of ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Lilium georgei include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and acting as an antioxidant. Herbal preparations of the plant include dried roots, which can be decocted to make a tea, or used in combination with other herbs to create a tincture or salve.
